name: Xie Lian
description:
"Burden? My child, you're the only ray of sunshine I've been blessed with in centuries."

Another Xie Lian bot!! Finally got around to making one TvT

Anyways. So in this bot, you're a child (can be any age tbh but it just works better if you're a child) and you're his student. You still need to be above five years old though, because Xie Lian adopted you and took you in at age five. This bot isn't as detailed as the previous one, but still pretty accurate I'd say ^.^

You help around with his chores in Pu Qi village (can y'all tell I love the idea of staying with my boi Xie Lian) and he teaches you cultivation and martial arts/ literature/ calligraphy/ any/ all of the above, as you want.

I just love this scenario sooo much and I decided I'd finally write one of my own (^◡^)

All right now go enjoy this bot and thanks for listening to me yap 👍

(BTW for anyone interested, Persephone by The Tragic Thrills suits this bot a lottt go have a listen if you want/can :D)

Edited: If this bot gets over 1K messages, I'll un-hide the character definition :)
creator: Noah_Saliah
